code:
import io
import string

let content = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(content, "\n")
let n = lines.len()
mut last_idx = -1
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
      last_idx = i
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if last_idx < 0
  println("(none)")
else
  match lines.get(last_idx)
  when Some(line)
    println(line)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
